calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Set For Trial On Nov-01-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Business Records Pursuant To Subpoena To Nonparty San Francisco General Hospital And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ross McKissick (415-495-0440; ross@harrispersonalinjury.com) of Harris Personal Injury Lawyers, Inc. for plaintiff.
Rebecca Martino (650-592-5400) of Coddington, Hicks, & Danforth for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MOHAMAD RASHEDI's Motion To Compel Production Of Business Records Pursuant To Subpoena To Nonparty San Francisco General Hospital And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED in Part.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2020 Set For Trial On Jun-01-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Off Calendar
